content.en:
The headquarters of the Giant Elephant Clan is the Giant Elephant City, and the environment of the Wild Realm is similar to that of the Savages, but some races still like to build cities, which is undoubtedly learning from the outside world.

The Giant Elephant City is very majestic, and the materials used are all stones unique to the Wasteland, and the entire city is even more majestic than some of the divine cities in the outside world.

Ye Tian infiltrated the Giant Elephant City, preparing to directly capture the patriarch of the Giant Elephant Clan.

However, just when Ye Tian came to the residence of the patriarch of the Colossus Clan, a change occurred.

"You're alien?"

A voice came into Ye Tian's ears.

Swish!

A burly man appeared in front of Ye Tian.

In appearance, the man was human-like, but his hands were dark and metallic.

"Starry Peak!"

Ye Tian focused on this big man, and immediately used his copying talent to check the other party's talent.

At this time, Ye Tiancai discovered that this big man was not a Colossus clan, but a clansman called the Mountain Ghost Clan.

"Who are you?"

Ye Tian asked.

The big man of the mountain ghost clan said: "I am a loose cultivator in the desolate realm, you can call me the ghost hand bone master." I'm here to arrest you, you are not small, you dare to snatch the Zichenmu of multiple clans. You have offended multiple innate gods now, and I was hired by one of the innate gods just to arrest you!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

His actions during this time finally attracted the attention of the innate gods, and although the innate gods could not do anything, they could send others to come.

And the innate gods have a certain degree of control over the wasteland, and it is not difficult to find Ye Tian.

The Lord of the Ghost Hand Bone must have come here to wait under the guidance of the innate gods.

It is even very likely that the eyes of one or more innate gods are watching here!

"Alien, do you want to tie it up yourself, or do you want me to do it?"

The Ghost Hand Bone Lord threatened.

"You're not qualified!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Look for death!"

The Ghost Hand Bone Lord was furious, and his hands turned into black claws, and he grabbed them fiercely.

From these claws, Ye Tian felt the breath of the origin artifact.

Obviously, the Ghost Hand Bone Lord had integrated a pair of Origin Artifact Claws into his hands, and had created a Claw Dao Peerless Technique, and the power of this claw was very powerful, even comparable to a blow from the Cosmic God.

If it is other galaxy levels, it will definitely not be able to compete with this move, but for Ye Tian, the strength of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord is only comparable to that of the Sword Feather God Lord, or it will be slightly stronger, but it will definitely not be much stronger.

Ye Tian could have killed the other party in one move, but as soon as he thought that there were innate gods secretly watching, he was ready to keep a low profile and not expose his true strength.

Once his true strength is exposed, maybe he will face real danger next time.

There must be many powerful cosmic gods in the wasteland, and that is not something he can bear.

If he revealed his true strength, wouldn't he provoke those terrifying cosmic gods?

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Ghost Hand Bone Lord.

He retained most of his strength, only showed a small part, and fought with the Ghost Hand Bone Lord with a strength that was not weaker than the Ghost Hand Bone Lord.

The battle between the two sides almost destroyed the Giant Elephant City, but under the guidance of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, the two entered the sky above the Giant Elephant City and fought to avoid the destruction of the Giant Elephant City.

The Ghost Hand Bone Lord didn't dare to destroy the Giant Elephant City, otherwise the creator of the Giant Elephant Clan would not spare him.

He was just a casual cultivator, his former clan and the innate gods he relied on had fallen and died, and he didn't dare to provoke an innate god without a background.

Little by little, time passed.

Ye Tian deliberately relied on his super recovery ability and strong defense power to consume the strength of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord little by little, and constantly injured the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, so that the Ghost Hand Bone Lord's state continued to decline and gradually became weaker.

Half a day passed.

Ye Tian finally seized an opportunity and hit the Ghost Hand Bone Master with a single sword.

Immediately, the Ghost Hand Bone Lord cast a secret technique, turning into a black shadow and quickly fleeing.

Ye Tian did not pursue, but flew into the Giant Elephant City, held the patriarch of the Giant Elephant Clan hostage, and took away the Zichenmu of the Giant Elephant Clan.

Then, Ye Tian left quickly.

Wasteland, somewhere deep in the mountains.

Ye Tian opened a temporary cave mansion and hid it here.

"Those innate gods who snooped on me should think that my strength is about the same as that of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, even if I send my men to attack me next time, at most I will send a subordinate who can kill the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, and it is impossible to send that kind of incomparably powerful cosmic god at once!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The other side.

More than a dozen innate gods gathered and chatted again, and the topic was Ye Tian.

"Everyone, before we used the power of the Wasteland to spy on the battle between the alien race and the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, the strength of the other party is very strong, only the galaxy level is comparable to the combat power of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord, and it is even more relied on super recovery and defense to defeat the Ghost Hand Bone Lord. Such a galaxy-level is placed in the outside world, and it is definitely an incomparably evil son of the universe, which can be called the hope of the generation of the universe aliens. If such a galaxy-level is killed, those alien races must be extremely distressed!"

"Yes, that alien must be killed, but the strength of the Ghost Hand Bone Lord is simply not enough, who to find?"

"Find those Lords!"

The upper clan was created by those powerful innate gods, which were more perfect and had the potential to become cosmic gods, which was not comparable to the lower clans.

The reason why it is difficult for the creatures of the lower clan to give birth to a cosmic god-level powerhouse is because they are not perfect enough, and their potential and talent are not enough.

"If you find the Shang clan, the price is not small. Moreover, we must also find a cosmic god to be insured. Those powerful cosmic gods, the price of letting them make a move must be very high, and it is not very safe to let a weak cosmic god make a move!"

"How about finding a desolate demon?"

An innate deity reminded.

"The desolate demon, the most perfect race in the desolate world, the desolate demon can mobilize the power of the desolate world, and it can also fight beyond the level, we only need to find a cosmic god-level desolate demon, even if it is not a very powerful cosmic god, but relying on the power of the desolate world is enough to kill that alien race. Moreover, the desolate demon is very belligerent, if we know that such an anti-heaven galaxy-level alien is coming, maybe we won't have to pay much price!"

Another innate deity spirit Dao.

They discussed it for a while, and immediately decided to invite a cosmic god-level desolate demon.

That's it.

A few days passed, and Ye Tian continued to look for Zi Chenmu.

this day.

Ye Tian flew to a mountain range, and suddenly felt a strange aura.

In the dark, a wave of pressure hits.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian showed a slightly solemn expression.

It's obvious.

An enemy has arrived, and it is very strong.

Rumble!!!

A force of heaven and earth crushed it, and the surrounding space was solidified.

It's not a space force, it's a mysterious force that affects the space and makes it freeze.

"Open!"

Ye Tian mobilized his spatial talent to confront this force and blast away the restraints.

"Amazing, just a galaxy-level cultivator, you actually broke free from my suppression, those innate gods didn't lie, your strength is really strong!"

As soon as the words fell.

A young man walked out of the void and looked at Ye Tian with a smile.

Ye Tian's eyes also looked at the past, revealing a slightly surprised look.

"Desolate Demon!"

Ye Tian said lightly.
